# dependencytrack_license (Data Source)

Fetches a single license from Dependency-Track by its SPDX-style license ID. Works for both built-in and custom licenses.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a license by its SPDX-style license ID
data "dependencytrack_license" "apache" {
  license_id = "Apache-2.0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `license_id` (String) The SPDX-style license ID to look up (e.g. `Apache-2.0`)

### Read-Only

- `comment` (String) A comment about the license
- `fsf_libre` (Boolean) Whether the license is considered libre by the Free Software Foundation
- `header` (String) The standard license header
- `id` (String) The ID of the license (same as `license_id`)
- `name` (String) The name of the license
- `osi_approved` (Boolean) Whether the license is approved by the Open Source Initiative
- `see_also` (List of String) A list of URLs with more information about the license
- `template` (String) The standard license template
- `text` (String) The full text of the license
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the license
